originalTitle: Why are South Korean fans so angry at their football coach?
summary: Hong Myung-bo has resigned after South Korea failed to advance to the World Cup knockout stages.
content:
Angry fans in Seoul waited for the arrival of the former head coach of South Korea's men's national football team after the country failed to advance to the World Cup knockout stages.

Announcing his resignation at a news conference in Mexico on Sunday, Hong Myung-bo said that "we didn't deliver the results that our fans expected".

The announcement came after the country's President Lee Jae Myung said that he felt "not just confusion but utter bewilderment at the unexpected outcome".

The president also called for an investigation into reasons behind the team's performance.

Seoul correspondent Jake Kwon explains how Hong went from star captain in 2002 to shamed head coach in 2026.
chineseTitle: 为什么韩国球迷对他们的足球教练如此愤怒？
chineseSummary: 韩国队未能进入世界杯淘汰赛阶段后，洪明甫辞职。
chineseContent:
在韩国未能晋级世界杯淘汰赛阶段后，愤怒的首尔球迷等待着韩国男足前主教练的到来。

洪明甫周日在墨西哥举行的新闻发布会上宣布辞职，他表示“我们没有取得球迷期望的结果”。

在此消息公布之前，韩国总统李在明表示，他“对意外的结果不仅感到困惑，而且感到完全困惑”。

总统还呼吁对球队表现背后的原因进行调查。

首尔记者 Jake Kwon 解释了洪如何从 2002 年的明星队长变成 2026 年蒙羞的主教练。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
